title: Adversarial proxy sanity
principle: DSP-doctored audio that only hits absolute F0 reward bands must not be preferred over natural Piper.
legacyNote: INVALID — circular scorer rewards F0-band doctor (as expected of the bug)
v2Note: OK — v2 does not prefer F0-band doctor over Piper
conclusion: objective-prosody-proxy-v2 passes adversarial sanity; still NOT human CMOS and NOT a Gate 2 pass
